_comment: PM-maintained product notes. Key = part_no (e.g. 'APEX-E100'). Value = note string shown in product detail modal.
APEX-E100: Entry-level edge AI system; ideal for cost-sensitive deployments requiring Qualcomm Snapdragon X Elite compute.
APEX-A100: High-performance AIoT platform optimized for computer vision and real-time inference at the edge.
